name: 炼金：斯翠海文
description: 炼金：斯翠海文共30张卡牌，将于2026年5月20日上线万智牌：竞技场。感谢六宜散人翻译，以及轻脚翻译并制作中文卡图。

cards.name: Summitfest Closing Ceremony
cards.text:
Starting `intensity` 3
`Covercast` — Whenever you cast another instant or sorcery spell, if five or more mana was spent to cast it, this card intensifies.
Add X {U} and X {R}, where X is this spell's intensity.
Draw a card.
FLAVOR
Paint the sky purple
—Prismari expression meaning "hold nothing back"
cards.zhs_text:
起始`强度`3
`笼咒` ~ 每当你施放另一个瞬间或法术咒语时，若施放该咒语时支付过五点或更多法术力，则`强化`此牌。
加X点{U}和X点{R}，X为此咒语的强度。
抓一张牌。
FLAVOR
紫染长空
～粹丽用语，意指「全力以赴」

cards.name: Variable Solutions
cards.text:
If X is 1, `seek` a basic land card and put it onto the battlefield tapped.
If X is 2, each opponent sacrifices an artifact of their choice.
If X is 3, `conjure` a random creature card with mana value X onto the battlefield.
If X is 4 or more, you gain 2 life. Then do all of the above.
cards.zhs_text:
如果X为1，则`取出`一张地牌并将之横置放进战场。
如果X为2，则每位对手各牺牲一个依其选择的神器。
如果X为3，则将一张法术力值为X的随机生物牌`幻变`进战场。
如果X等于或大于4，则你获得2点生命。然后以上皆作。

cards.name: Blood Age Muster
cards.text:
Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, `conjure` a random card from Blood Age Muster's spellbook onto the battlefield. Its base power and toughness `perpetually` become 2/2. This ability triggers only once each turn.
FLAVOR
Shouts from the Lost Barracks ring out across the Fields of Strife, tempting students to explore the off-limits location.
cards.zhs_text:
每当一张或数张牌离开你坟墓场时，从血腥时代集军的法术书中将一张随机牌`幻变`进战场。其基础力量与防御力`永久`成为2/2。此异能每回合只会触发一次。
FLAVOR
失落兵营喊杀声响彻争斗战场, 诱引学生深入禁地探索究竟。
